message: Oh, hey. Just trying to figure out which university to apply to. It's so confusing.
Yeah, it can be overwhelming. Have you narrowed it down to any options yet?
Sort of. I'm looking at a couple of schools that have good programs for what I want to study, but I can't decide.
What are you thinking of studying?
I'm interested in environmental science. I want to go somewhere that has a strong program and good research opportunities.
That sounds awesome. Have you looked at the campus life and the support services they offer? That might help you decide.
Not really. I guess I should. I don't just want a good program; I want to feel comfortable there too.
Exactly. And it's worth visiting the campuses if you can. Sometimes you get a gut feeling about a place when you see it in person.
That's a good idea. Maybe I can plan some visits over the next few weekends.
Definitely. And make sure to talk to some current students if you can. They can give you the inside scoop on what it's really like.
Thanks, that's really helpful. I feel a bit better about this now.
Anytime. We're all in the same boat, trying to figure this stuff out.
True. Let's just make sure we end up somewhere we love, right?
